title: Micro-Contradiction
summary: A small observatory-system inconsistency rhymes with the earlier air anomaly, implying cross-domain structure.

narrative.newInfo: An independent contradiction appears in a second domain, reducing one-off coincidence confidence.
narrative.dripHook: If two domains drift in similar ways, what shared process is underneath?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Pattern reward: anomaly starts to look structured.
narrative.notes: Do not reuse Chapter 2 timestamp mechanism; keep contradiction subtle but concrete.

rewardTokens.description: System behavior fails to fully match expected state.
Reader model shifts from isolated oddity to possible patterned anomaly.
